Decision: Real-time vs Batch Scoring
Decision made on November 3, 2025 in the Product Strategy meeting with CTO Marcus Webb and VP Engineering Priya Sharma.
Decision: We will implement real-time scoring with a hybrid approach — instant scoring on lead creation using a lightweight model, with a full model re-score running every 4 hours.
Rationale: Customer interviews showed that 68% of enterprise customers respond to hot leads within 1 hour. Batch scoring (even hourly) means missed windows. The hybrid approach balances latency with computational cost.
Alternatives Rejected: 
1. Pure batch (hourly) — Too slow for enterprise use case
